name: SP8192 Parcae Trajectory Readout + Late Loop Onset
author: Artem Buldin
technique_summary: SP8192 + Parcae-style loop reinjection + grouped trajectory readout + late loop onset at step 2600 + full legal TTT
notes: Single-seed non-record submission. This was the strongest distinct Parcae-family result we reached, but the total submission size was 16,061,982 bytes, so it is not valid for the 16MB leaderboard track in its current form.
